metadata.title:
F0RTY-E|CHT
SPECIAL


POLICE

APPOINTED TO HELP


HANDLE SITUATION

pages.raw_text:
In all As special policemen have
been appointed by Mayor Pratt to
assist the police in suppressing the
i. w. w. free speech insurrection.
The men are appointed under the
five-day emergency provision Of the
city charter, which permits the
mayor to appoint special officers
whenever he deems the peace of
the city seriously menaced. He has
declared an emergency in the pres
ent instance, and can appoint all
the special officers that he deems
necessary. The men receive 1915
per day and the whole special force
Is costing the city $l34 per day.


The creation of the special force
has come as timely move for the
gang of city hall politicians that
fill such jobs with their favorites.
In the list Of specials appointed by
the mayor will be found names that
have been prominent as poll book
holders, challengers and handy men
In democratic city politics in the
past. Here Is the list:


G.. l.. Gordon, John Kits, J. F.
Parker. Oscar Rose. George Nor
